title: Ditassa longicaulis
taxonomy: Ditassa longicaulis is classified as a species within the genus Ditassa, which is a part of the Apocynaceae family. The Apocynaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as dogbane or oleander family. Ditassa longicaulis is a type of flowering plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. It belongs to the order Gentianales, which also includes other flowering plant families such as Rubiaceae and Loganiaceae.
